rule.name: Advérbio curto + conjunção + advérbio de modo
Remove adj tag from 'precisa' in obvious cases
Pela is not a verb, it is always SPS.+
Antes can't be a verb and an RG, it is always RG
In this case SOBRE is SPS00
In this case PRAZER is NCMS000
In this case HÁ is VMIP3S0
Adicionar tag de verbo ao substantivo
